requirement_topic.en: EPAC Classification — Pedelec ≤250 W / ≤25 km/h Safety (EN 15194:2017)

summary.en: In the EU, an electrically power-assisted cycle (EPAC / pedelec) is defined under EN 15194:2017 as a cycle with pedal assistance only, a continuous-rated motor ≤250 W, and automatic cut-off at 25 km/h (or when the rider stops pedalling). Such vehicles are classified as bicycles under the Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC (and its successor) and do NOT require type-approval under Regulation (EU) 168/2013. EN 15194:2017 is the harmonised standard; conformity gives presumption of compliance with the Machinery Directive essential health and safety requirements. The standard covers the complete cycle including battery, motor, charger, and control system.
summary.zh: 在欧盟，电动助力自行车（EPAC/Pedelec）按EN 15194:2017定义为：仅提供踏板助力、持续额定功率≤250W、在25km/h（或骑行者停止踩踏时）自动断开助力的自行车。此类车辆依据机械指令2006/42/EC（及其后继指令）被归类为自行车，无需依据法规(EU) 168/2013进行型式认证。EN 15194:2017为协调标准，符合该标准可推定满足机械指令的基本健康与安全要求。该标准覆盖整车，包括电池、电机、充电器及控制系统。
summary.zht: 在歐盟，電動助力自行車（EPAC/Pedelec）按EN 15194:2017定義為：僅提供踏板助力、持續額定功率≤250W、在25km/h（或騎行者停止踩踏時）自動斷開助力的自行車。此類車輛依據機械指令2006/42/EC（及其後繼指令）被歸類為自行車，無需依據法規(EU) 168/2013進行型式認證。EN 15194:2017為協調標準，符合該標準可推定滿足機械指令的基本健康與安全要求。該標準覆蓋整車，包括電池、電機、充電器及控制系統。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194:2017 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles
Directive 2006/42/EC — Machinery Directive (as applicable to EPACs classified as bicycles)
Regulation (EU) 168/2013 — approval and market surveillance of two- or three-wheel vehicles (applies above EPAC limits)

gap.en: The key classification gap is motor power: CN GB 17761-2018 permits up to 400 W; EU EN 15194:2017 caps EPAC at 250 W continuous rated output. A CN e-bike with a motor rated 251–400 W does NOT qualify as an EPAC in the EU and instead falls under Regulation (EU) 168/2013 type-approval as an L1e-A vehicle (see ebikeeu-typeapproval fragment), which is a substantially heavier regulatory burden. Exporters must confirm motor nameplate rated power is ≤250 W before claiming EPAC status. Additionally, EN 15194 requires the assist to cut off at 25 km/h (same as CN), but also mandates that the system assists only while pedalling — throttle-only (twist-and-go) modes common on some CN models would disqualify the vehicle from EPAC status.
gap.zh: 主要分类差距在于电机功率：中国GB 17761-2018允许最高400W；欧盟EN 15194:2017将EPAC连续额定输出功率上限定为250W。功率在251-400W之间的中国电动自行车在欧盟不符合EPAC资格，将依据法规(EU) 168/2013作为L1e-A类车辆接受型式认证（详见ebikeeu-typeapproval片段），监管负担大幅加重。出口商须在申请EPAC认定前确认电机铭牌额定功率≤250W。此外，EN 15194要求助力在25km/h时断开（与中国相同），但还规定系统仅在踩踏时提供助力——部分中国车型常见的纯油门（拧把）模式将使该车失去EPAC资格。
gap.zht: 主要分類差距在於電機功率：中國GB 17761-2018允許最高400W；歐盟EN 15194:2017將EPAC連續額定輸出功率上限定為250W。功率在251-400W之間的中國電動自行車在歐盟不符合EPAC資格，將依據法規(EU) 168/2013作為L1e-A類車輛接受型式認證（詳見ebikeeu-typeapproval片段），監管負擔大幅加重。出口商須在申請EPAC認定前確認電機銘牌額定功率≤250W。此外，EN 15194要求助力在25km/h時斷開（與中國相同），但還規定系統僅在踩踏時提供助力——部分中國車型常見的純油門（扭把）模式將使該車失去EPAC資格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC via EN 15194:2017 for EPAC/pedelec ≤250W/25km/h
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 under SAMR for all electric bicycles sold in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: China's primary e-bike safety standard is GB 17761-2018 (Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles), which mandates: motor ≤400 W, maximum speed ≤25 km/h, vehicle mass (including battery) ≤55 kg, must have pedals. GB 17761 is a mandatory GB standard administered by SAMR. The speed and pedal-assist limits are similar to EU pedelec limits, but the power limit (400 W vs EU 250 W) and mass limit (55 kg — no equivalent in EN 15194) differ. CN e-bikes may therefore have motors up to 400 W that would fall outside the EU EPAC classification.
summary.zh: 中国电动自行车主要安全标准为GB 17761-2018（电动自行车安全技术规范），强制要求：电机功率≤400W，最高车速≤25km/h，整车质量（含电池）≤55kg，须具备脚踏骑行功能。GB 17761为市场监管总局管理的强制性国标。限速及助力限制与欧盟Pedelec相近，但功率限制（400W对比欧盟250W）和整车质量限制（55kg，EN 15194无对应要求）存在差异。因此，功率在251-400W之间的中国电动自行车将超出欧盟EPAC分类范围。
summary.zht: 中國電動自行車主要安全標準為GB 17761-2018（電動自行車安全技術規範），強制要求：電機功率≤400W，最高車速≤25km/h，整車質量（含電池）≤55kg，須具備腳踏騎行功能。GB 17761為市場監管總局管理的強制性國標。限速及助力限制與歐盟Pedelec相近，但功率限制（400W對比歐盟250W）和整車質量限制（55kg，EN 15194無對應要求）存在差異。因此，功率在251-400W之間的中國電動自行車將超出歐盟EPAC分類範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)

summary.en: EN 15194:2017 incorporates the general cycle safety requirements of EN ISO 4210 by reference and adds EPAC-specific electrical and functional safety requirements. Mechanical requirements include frame fatigue tests, fork tests, braking performance (with increased stopping-distance limits due to motor-assisted mass), handlebar strength, and lighting. The standard requires that braking performance be validated with the electric drive engaged. Electrical subsystems (motor drive, battery, charger, wiring) must meet EN 15194 Clauses 4 and 5. CE marking is applied to the complete vehicle.
summary.zh: EN 15194:2017通过引用纳入通用自行车安全标准EN ISO 4210的要求，并增加了EPAC特有的电气及功能安全要求。机械要求包括：车架疲劳测试、前叉测试、制动性能（因电机助力增加了整车质量，制动距离限制相应调整）、车把强度及照明。该标准要求在电驱动系统工作状态下对制动性能进行验证。电气子系统（电机驱动、电池、充电器、线束）须满足EN 15194第4和第5条款。CE标志适用于整车。
summary.zht: EN 15194:2017通過引用納入通用自行車安全標準EN ISO 4210的要求，並增加了EPAC特有的電氣及功能安全要求。機械要求包括：車架疲勞測試、前叉測試、制動性能（因電機助力增加了整車質量，制動距離限制相應調整）、車把強度及照明。該標準要求在電驅動系統工作狀態下對制動性能進行驗證。電氣子系統（電機驅動、電池、充電器、線束）須滿足EN 15194第4和第5條款。CE標誌適用於整車。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194:2017 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles
EN ISO 4210-2:2023 — Cycles — Safety requirements for bicycles — Part 2: Requirements for city and trekking, young adult, mountain and racing bicycles (incorporated by reference)

gap.en: Full re-testing to EN 15194:2017 (including incorporated EN ISO 4210 tests) is required at an EU-recognised test laboratory. Chinese GB 17761-2018 test reports are not accepted. Specific gaps include: (a) braking performance tests must be repeated with electric assist engaged per EN 15194 protocol; (b) EN ISO 4210 fatigue test methods differ from GB counterparts; (c) lighting requirements under EN 15194 reference EN 13194 (cycle lighting), which differs from China's GB 17761 lighting clause. The manufacturer (or EU-authorised representative) must compile a Technical File and issue a EU Declaration of Conformity.
gap.zh: 须在欧盟认可的测试实验室重新完成EN 15194:2017的全项测试（包括引用的EN ISO 4210测试）。中国GB 17761-2018测试报告不被接受。主要差距包括：（a）制动性能测试须按EN 15194规程在电动助力系统工作状态下重新进行；（b）EN ISO 4210疲劳测试方法与中国对应标准不同；（c）EN 15194照明要求参照EN 13194（自行车照明），与中国GB 17761照明条款存在差异。制造商（或欧盟授权代表）须编制技术文件并签发欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: 須在歐盟認可的測試實驗室重新完成EN 15194:2017的全項測試（包括引用的EN ISO 4210測試）。中國GB 17761-2018測試報告不被接受。主要差距包括：（a）制動性能測試須按EN 15194規程在電動助力系統工作狀態下重新進行；（b）EN ISO 4210疲勞測試方法與中國對應標準不同；（c）EN 15194照明要求參照EN 13194（自行車照明），與中國GB 17761照明條款存在差異。製造商（或歐盟授權代表）須編制技術文件並簽發歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 15194:2017 is the harmonised standard for EPAC under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 mechanical requirements under SAMR

summary.en: GB 17761-2018 covers similar mechanical safety areas (frame, brakes, lighting) but uses different test methods and limits. Chinese e-bike braking distance requirements differ from EN 15194 test conditions. CN vehicles are also tested to GB/T 15623 (cycle test methods). A Chinese type-approval test report from a CNCA-designated lab under GB 17761 is not transferable to EU CE conformity assessment under EN 15194.
summary.zh: GB 17761-2018涵盖类似的机械安全领域（车架、制动、照明），但采用不同的测试方法和限值。中国电动自行车制动距离要求与EN 15194的测试条件不同。中国车辆还依据GB/T 15623（自行车测试方法）进行测试。CNCA指定实验室依据GB 17761出具的中国型式认证测试报告，不可转用于EN 15194下的欧盟CE合格评定。
summary.zht: GB 17761-2018涵蓋類似的機械安全領域（車架、制動、照明），但採用不同的測試方法和限值。中國電動自行車制動距離要求與EN 15194的測試條件不同。中國車輛還依據GB/T 15623（自行車測試方法）進行測試。CNCA指定實驗室依據GB 17761出具的中國型式認證測試報告，不可轉用於EN 15194下的歐盟CE合格評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)
